items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.2 mph at a 27.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the St. Louis Cardinals, KC 10, STL 12. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-3 | 2 HR, 2 BB, K in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.2 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Cardinals Recap
